message:
test(quality): add comprehensive unit tests for quality module

Add 57 unit tests covering:
- Quality scoring dimensions (structure, content, evidence, usage, toolchain, freshness)
- Weight calculations and defaults
- Quality breakdown formatting
- Issue detection and suggestions
- UBS client construction and result parsing
- UbsFinding serialization and severity handling

Previously the quality module had only 1 test. Now has 57 tests
providing thorough coverage of the scoring system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
